headline: Assessing Steel Dynamics (STLD) Valuation After Analyst Upgrades Tariff Shifts And The BlueScope Bid
summary: Steel Dynamics (STLD) is back in focus after analysts highlighted higher earnings projections, supportive ratings, and an ambitious, recently rejected US$11b bid for Australian steel producer BlueScope. See our latest analysis for Steel Dynamics. Despite a recent 11% 30 day share price decline and a 3.1% negative year to date share price return, Steel Dynamics still shows strong momentum in the background with a 36.1% 1 year total shareholder return and a 291.5% 5 year total shareholder...
